name: uw-bothell-course-scheduler
description: AI-powered course scheduling assistant for UW Bothell students

scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.vercel-build: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.docs: echo 'See README.md and SETUP.md for documentation'
